headline: American International Group (AIG) Stock Valuation Check After Recent Pullback And Analyst Upside Forecast
summary: Event overview and why American International Group is on investors’ screens American International Group (AIG) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading data highlighted mixed share performance, with the stock roughly flat over the past week and showing declines over the past month and past 3 months. With the shares last closing at US$75.74 and longer term total returns remaining positive over the past 3 and 5 years, investors are reassessing how AIG’s current valuation lines up against...
